TestCase z54Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_b = (int*)malloc(t1.na * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.na * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there are at least 2 elements to perform duplication
    if (follow_case.na < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Duplicate element at index i (i = 0) to index i+1, shifting later elements
    int i = 0;
    for (int j = follow_case.na - 1; j > i + 1; --j) {
        follow_case.b[j] = follow_case.b[j - 1];
    }
    follow_case.b[i + 1] = follow_case.b[i];
    
    return follow_case;
}
